sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76307" key="o)yiblasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψιβλαστ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n76307.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">late sprouting</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shooting</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:1:14:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:6:6:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.6.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
